samples.title: RR 40-SPK CHROME 18X3.5 BT/XL-HUB 3/4" AXL 00 LTR
samples.description_raw:
• HardDrive Chrome wheels come in three unique patterns with chrome spokes and nipples to maximize the look of your custom ride
  • The Steel Chrome Rim is laced in three styles to the Chrome Billet Aluminum hub, in either the traditional 40-Spoke pattern, a custom 60 spoke pattern or the custom 48-Big Spoke with beefy 9mm spokes
  • Wheels are made for custom fitment and may require modified axle spacing and/or rotor/pulley spacing
  • It is recommended to measure you current wheel hubs to help you select the best option for your ride
  • Wheels come complete with spoke sealant, Chrome valve stem, inner sleeve and sealed wheel bearings, except the `84-99 fitments which comes with ¾” Timken bearings with outer seal installed (greasing is required).
  • Narrow Glide hubs will not accommodate the use of Speedo Drive
  • Spoke wheels are sealed for tubeless application, however; spoke wheels do require service interval maintenance which may disturb the sealant
  • Sealant is not covered under warranty as a manufacturing defect
  • All wheels use hub mounted brake rotors with OEM 5 bolt pattern
  • All Bearings and Bearing Spacers on this page are for replacement on HardDrive Spokes wheels only
  • Please refer to the Hub Reference Chart for wheel to motorcycle selection
  • FRONT WHEELS
  • REAR WHEELS
  • REPLACEMENT PARTS

samples.title: TECHSTAR SOFTSHELL VEST BRIGHT RED 3X
samples.description_raw: The Techstar Softshell Vest is the ideal garment for riders that will be outside training on cool days and are looking for the warmth a windproof vest can offer during their morning warm-up or late afternoon riding sessions. Constructed with a windproof light softshell and a fleeced inner lining, the Techstar Softshell Vest is a great piece of kit to have especially on those windy days, with its athletic cut designed to fit comfortably over motocross gear.

payload.description:
• 12-mil vinyl, backed with genuine 3M® Adhesive
  • 3 numbers per pack
  • Number font is a custom-modified, impact style, race font.
  • Used by top Supercross and Motocross teams - Monster Energy Kawasaki, Geico Honda, and Star Yamaha
  • Extremely tough, durable, and able to withstand pressure washing without peeling up!

payload.name: XT9000 Pinlock Insert
payload.description:
• TCT-Ultra™ 3K Carbon fiber shell provides superior strength and impact dispersal properties
  • CAD-refined aerodynamics result in a streamlined profile and balanced footprint, minimizing both lift and turbulence for a smoother, quieter, and more stable ride
  • Advanced multi-layer EPS provides superior energy absorption
  • Strategically placed channels throughout the EPS foam provide increased airflow
  • Equipped with U.S. DOT Certification and the ECE 22.06 Safety standard, which requires a wider range of testing than the previous 22.05 certification
  • Optically Clear MaxVision® Pinlock® ready face shield installed. Anti-scratch coated and offers 95% UV-A & UV-B protection
  • FREE Dark Smoke Pinlock® 100% MaxVision® face shield and Pinlock® 120 anti-fog insert included
  • Wide eye port allows for greater peripheral vision and downward visibility. When the face shield is removed the eye port accommodates most sizes and brands of goggles. (Eye port is 12cm Tall)
  • Face shield ensures a secure and evenly distributed seal across the eye port
  • Adjustable chin bar vent intake redirects airflow to the interior surface of the shield, reducing fog build-up
  • Tool-less face shield system makes swapping between goggles or tinted and mirrored lenses quick and easy
  • Action Cam mounting plate (included) provides the rider a flat surface to mount cameras and other accessories (Kit includes vent plate & screw only)
  • Comm-Ready speaker pockets allow for easily installation of your favorite BlueTooth® communication system speakers
  • Emergency release system: Tabs located under the neck roll allow easy removal of the cheek pads by emergency personnel
  • Integrated reflective material located on the rear vents help with nighttime visibility.
  • Included breath deflector and aero skirt (chin curtain) helps reduce wind noise
  • Titanium Double D-Rings helps prevent corrosion

payload.name: Ultimax UX Drive Belt

  • Purpose-built for the unique demands of harsh CVT environments

payload.name: Power Commander 6
payload.description: Tried, True, and Tested, the Power Commander line continues with the Power Commander 6. The Power Commander 6 tuning device optimizes your fuel and timing curve (where applicable), giving you the confidence to roam freely. Dynojet has developed and streamlined a user interface that allows selecting a tuning map to be more accessible for the end user. All the same, benefits you have relied on for over 20 years to keep you at the front of the pack.

payload.name: Quiet Insert
payload.description: Many municipalities and tracks have begun to implement new, tougher regulations that limit the sound output of street bikes, off-road cycles and ATVs. In the interest of health & safety and of maintaining good relationships between riders and the non-riding community, Two Brothers Racing has developed a series of highly effective sound reducing tips which can help everyone to get along.

samples.name: Sportster RC1 Shock
samples.description: The FOX RC-1 V-twin rear shocks are designed to maintain damping control throughout your ride. The internal floating piston is housed in an external reservoir to separate the shock oil from the nitrogen gas so they can never mix like stock shocks. The piggy back reservoir also has adjustments affecting the compression and rebound so you have all the controls you need to dial in the perfect ride.
samples.product_features:
• Model-specific optimized ride tune
  • 24-position adjustable compression
  • 12-position adjustable rebound
  • Spring preload setting guide marks
  • Aluminum piggyback reservoir
  • Gas-charged mono-tube with internal floating piston (IFP)
  • 1.5-inch 6061-T6 aluminum type III hard anodized body
  • Fully rebuildable and revalvable
  • Advanced high-flow, deflective disc velocity-sensitive damping
  • 5/8-inch low friction, super-finished hard chrome shaft
  • Matte black spring and black anodized preload ring
  • Recommended for up to 240lbs total ride load

samples.name: REGULATOR/REC POLARIS

samples.name: Shifter Kit - V-Rod
samples.description: Electronically suspends the ignition system, allowing the transmission to smoothly shift up or down with just the push of a button
samples.product_features:
• Electronically suspends the ignition system, allowing the transmission to smoothly shift up or down with just the push of a button
  • Shift up at partial or full throttle and back down at the touch of a button
  • No need to use the foot shifter; clutch is used only when starting or stopping
  • Works for normal street riding or full-throttle shifting
  • Perfect match for male and female riders who own bikes that require a lot of hand strength to pull in the clutch lever
  • OEM shifting ability is retained after installation
  • Includes a dual-button handlebar control, a shift cylinder plated with a lustrous chrome finish, bolt-on shift cylinder support bracket and a state-of-the-art control module that sends a quick signal from the handlebar control to the shift cylinder
  • Includes electronic ignition kill module and step-by-step instructions with photos for easy installation
  • Universal kit also available with dual-button handlebar control to fit 7/8" or 1" diameter handlebars/clip-ons; installation may require purchase of frame tube brackets for shift cylinder mounting (sold separately)
  • Made in the USA
  • Not suitable for 4-speed transmissions.
